compressed_prompt:
Write a plot for a story about two people who swap fingerprints. Include a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>. In your response please avoid using commas.
 
<<fingerprint swap>>
response:
<<Fingerprint Swap>> 
Alexandra Taylor was a skilled hacker who had been evading law enforcement for years. She had a reputation for being untouchable. Ethan Wright was a detective determined to catch her. One day they both visited the same police station for different reasons. Alexandra was there to gather information while Ethan was giving a statement. As they were both leaving they accidentally knocked into each other causing their fingers to touch a glass surface simultaneously. To their surprise they discovered that their fingerprints had swapped. Alexandra saw an opportunity to frame Ethan for her past crimes. She started leaving her fingerprints at crime scenes that Ethan had been investigating. Ethan was baffled as his fingerprints were found at the scenes. He knew he hadn't committed the crimes. As the evidence against him mounted Ethan was arrested. Alexandra felt a pang of guilt but she was also curious to see how far she could push the situation. Ethan was determined to clear his name. He started to investigate how his fingerprints ended up at the crime scenes. He eventually tracked down Alexandra and a cat and mouse game ensued. Ethan was able to outsmart Alexandra and she was finally caught. In the end Ethan was exonerated and Alexandra was brought to justice. The experience had changed Ethan and he was now more determined than ever to protect the innocent.
